mapper.select: /* SocialAccount.selectByProviderAndProviderId */ SELECT ID AS id, PROVIDER AS provider, PROVIDER_ID AS providerId, EMAIL AS email, NICKNAME AS nickname, PROFILE_IMAGE AS profileImage, STATUS AS status, PARTNER_ID AS partnerId, LAST_LOGIN_TM AS lastLoginTm, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm FROM TB_SOCIAL_ACCOUNT WHERE PROVIDER = #{provider} AND PROVIDER_ID = #{providerId} AND STATUS = 'active'

/* SocialAccount.selectById */ SELECT ID AS id, PROVIDER AS provider, PROVIDER_ID AS providerId, EMAIL AS email, NICKNAME AS nickname, PROFILE_IMAGE AS profileImage, STATUS AS status, PARTNER_ID AS partnerId, LAST_LOGIN_TM AS lastLoginTm, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm FROM TB_SOCIAL_ACCOUNT WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: /* SocialAccount.insertSocialAccount */ INSERT INTO TB_SOCIAL_ACCOUNT ( PROVIDER, PROVIDER_ID, EMAIL, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, STATUS, PARTNER_ID, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, 'active', COALESCE(#{partnerId}, 1), NOW(), NOW() )
